title: Illumina RNA Prep with Enrichment: Normalization
author: Opentrons

steps.title: This protocol performs normalization for the...
steps.instruction: This protocol performs normalization for the [Illimuina RNA Prep with Enrichment](https://www.illumina.com/products/by-type/sequencing-kits/library-prep-kits/rna-prep-enrichment.html) protocol. Normalization is the method of adding buffer to a set of samples so that their concentrations are uniform. This is usually so that they can be treated uniformly in subsequent steps. For example, after NGS library prep of multiple samples, the samples are normalized to the same concentration, so that the same volume of each sample can be pooled, and each sample is represented in equal proportions. A requirement for this Normalization protocol is that the concentrations and volumes are known i.e. previously quantified by Picogreen and aliquoted into a plate at a set volume, and formatted in a .csv file as input. You should upload a .csv file formatted in the following way, being sure to include the header line: ``` Sample_Plate,Sample_well,InitialVol,InitialConc,TargetConc sample_plate,A1,20,2.3,2 sample_plate,B1,20,3.99,2 sample_plate,C1,20,4.39,2 sample_plate,D1,20,3.95,2 sample_plate,E1,20,4.16,2 sample_plate,F1,20,3.81,2 sample_plate,G1,20,3.96,2 sample_plate,H1,20,3.41,2 ``` ---

steps.title: Download your protocol and unzip if needed
steps.instruction: Download your protocol and unzip if needed.

steps.title: Upload your custom labware to the...
steps.instruction: Upload your custom labware to the OT App by navigating to `More` > `Custom Labware` > `Add Labware`, and selecting your labware files (.json extensions) if needed.

steps.title: Upload your protocol file (
steps.instruction: Upload your protocol file (.py extension) to the OT App in the `Protocol` tab.

steps.title: Set up your deck according to the deck map
steps.instruction: Set up your deck according to the deck map.

steps.title: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App
steps.instruction: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support articles.
